# King of Dale ◆

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **2** · Spirit

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Dale_** or **_Esgaroth_** hero.
**Planning Action:** Exhaust King of Dale to reduce the cost of the next **_Dale_** ally you play this phase by 1 for each different player attachment on attached hero. That ally does not require a resource match.
